steps.title: Identify what we're calculating
steps.content: Julia used 60% of 800 feet of fencing. We need to find 60% of 800.

steps.title: Calculate 60% of 800
steps.content: To find 60% of 800, multiply: $$0.60 \times 800 = 480$$ Therefore, Julia used 480 feet of fencing to surround the vegetable garden. That matches choice C — C is correct.
